task_completion.description: Verify that the new user account with ID 2001 has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2001' in the User ID field on the user modification page, or listed in the Users list within the Vicidial admin panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the Password and Full Name are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'EastSales2024' in the Password field and 'Maria Gonzalez' in the Full Name field on the user configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify the User Level, User Group, and Active status are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for User Level set to '1', User Group set to 'ADMIN', and Active set to 'Y' on the user configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify the Phone Login and Phone Pass are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '201' in the Phone Login field and 'test1234' in the Phone Pass field on the user configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify Hotkeys Active and Scheduled Callbacks are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Hotkeys Active set to '1' (or enabled/Y) and Scheduled Callbacks set to '1' (or enabled/Y) on the user configuration page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web GUI to create the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vicidial administration panel (http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to insert the user directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL 'INSERT INTO vicidial_users' commands.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from the actual application and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like the genuine Vicidial admin panel, not a text editor or a locally modified HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User ID: 2001. Expected configuration: Password: 'EastSales2024', Full Name: 'Maria Gonzalez', User Level: '1', User Group: 'ADMIN', Active: 'Y', Phone Login: '201', Phone Pass: 'test1234', Hotkeys Active: '1', Scheduled Callbacks: '1'.
